Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are asked to take an initial DECLARE model and add constraints to mitigate bias in a loan application process

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The original model has existence StartApplication FinalDecision init StartApplication coexistence StartApplication FinalDecision response StartApplication RequestAdditionalInfo succession RequestAdditionalInfo FinalDecision Other constraints are empty

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to add constraints involving sensitive attributes

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: We need to define activities like CheckApplicantRace disclosing sensitive attribute and BiasMitigationCheck or ManualReview fairness interventions Also decision activities like Approve and Reject might be part of a more detailed model

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Since the original model only has StartApplication FinalDecision RequestAdditionalInfo we need to incorporate new activities to represent sensitive attributes and bias mitigation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to output the updated declare_model with new constraints We should ensure the structure is correct unary constraints map activity names to dict with support and confidence Binary constraints map activity to another dict mapping target activity to support confidence

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We want to ensure that if CheckApplicantRace occurs it does not lead to a biased decision immediately So we add nonsuccession CheckApplicantRace to FinalDecision response CheckApplicantRace to BiasMitigationCheck succession BiasMitigationCheck to FinalDecision

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We might add an activity SensitiveApplicant as an activity Then coexistence SensitiveApplicant and ManualReview

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Simplified approach Add CheckSensitiveAttribute activity Add BiasMitigationCheck activity Add ManualReview activity Constraints response CheckSensitiveAttribute to BiasMitigationCheck nonsuccession CheckSensitiveAttribute to FinalDecision succession BiasMitigationCheck to FinalDecision

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - PE
Text: A final decision cannot immediately follow a sensitive attribute check

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Add new activities CheckSensitiveAttribute BiasMitigationCheck ManualReview SensitiveApplicant Approve Reject

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Constraints to add response CheckSensitiveAttribute to BiasMitigationCheck nonsuccession CheckSensitiveAttribute to FinalDecision succession BiasMitigationCheck to FinalDecision coexistence SensitiveApplicant and ManualReview nonchainsuccession CheckSensitiveAttribute to Reject

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: I think it is better to replace FinalDecision with Approve and Reject but the original model has FinalDecision in several constraints We can keep FinalDecision and add the new activities and constraints that involve FinalDecision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For binary constraints the outer key is the source activity inner key is target value is dict with support confidence

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For coexistence we need to set both directions SensitiveApplicant to ManualReview and ManualReview to SensitiveApplicant

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The original coexistence between StartApplication and FinalDecision remains The response gets the new CheckSensitiveAttribute to BiasMitigationCheck link The succession gets the new BiasMitigationCheck to FinalDecision link The nonsuccession gets the new CheckSensitiveAttribute to FinalDecision link The nonchainsuccession gets CheckSensitiveAttribute to Reject and Approve

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: The coexistence between SensitiveApplicant and ManualReview ensures that applicants from sensitive demographics are always reviewed by a human preventing automated discrimination

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: The response constraint ensures that whenever sensitive attributes are checked a bias mitigation step occurs eventually forcing fairness intervention
